title: Small logic fix for podman pull with tls-verify
body:
Ensure we don't force TLS verification when --tls-verify is set to false.

Noticed this after I already acked #626

comments.body: @mheon did you test this or see a bug? I dont think that condition is needed.  Else LGTM
@baude As written, we set forceSecure even if `tls-verify` is manually set to false, which does not sound correct at all
LGTM, although I guess we don't have force Insecure.
@rhatdan I can't see many people wanting to force their pulls to not use TLS, but if it's actually a use case, we can always add support
Most likely not.  Lets get this in as is.

:pushpin: Commit f92c34d has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan f92c34dd0af895a4a6f07958a8ea4b04b6752d3e -->
